Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' executions that follow a path without any rejection activity (e.g., without 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER', 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION', etc.)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Payment Handled'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'"}"

Name: Number of 'Payment Handled' events preceded by 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' without intermediate rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Payment Handled'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'"}"

Name: Frequency of 'Payment Handled' in the most common variant: 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION → Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR → Request Payment → Payment Handled'
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Payment Handled'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity == 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity == 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity == 'Request Payment'"}"

Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' cases that originate from variants starting with 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and skipping approval by PRE_APPROVER entirely
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Payment Handled'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity != 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity != 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'"}"

Name: Number of 'Payment Handled' events associated with case amounts above 100 euros in variants that never include 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Payment Handled'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "case:Amount > 100 and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'"}"

Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' events that are directly preceded by 'Request Payment' without any prior rejection by PRE_APPROVER in the same case
